name: Oreta Building
description: The main administrative building of Laguna University, housing major department offices.

name: Gate 1
description: The primary entrance for students and vehicles entering the campus.

name: Gate 2
description: The secondary entrance and exit point located near the sports complex.

name: Athlete's Village
description: Housing facility for Laguna University's student athletes.

name: Jose Rizal Monument
description: A landmark monument dedicated to the national hero, located at the center of the campus.

name: LU 01 - LU 06
description: Main classroom block for General Education and basic college courses.

name: CHS Laboratory / LU 07
description: College of Health Sciences Laboratory for Nursing and Allied Health students.

name: SHS Faculty / LU 09
description: The central office for Senior High School faculty and coordinators.

name: LU 10
description: General purpose classroom for various college departments.

name: Records Office / LU 11
description: The office responsible for the maintenance of student permanent records and files.

name: Registrar / LU 13-14
description: The office for enrollment, grades, transcripts, and other academic documentation.

name: University Clinic / LU 16
description: Provides medical and first-aid services to students and faculty members.

name: Research Center / LU 17
description: The hub for academic research and university publication services.

name: HRMO / LU 18
description: Human Resource Management Office for faculty and staff services.

name: Cashier / LU 19
description: The central office for tuition payments and other financial transactions.

name: Admin Office / LU 20
description: Executive office of the university administration.

name: San Luis Gym
description: Major sports and events venue for university-wide gatherings.

name: Multi-Purpose Gym
description: Facility for basketball, volleyball, and physical education classes.

name: Pool Area
description: Laguna Sports Complex swimming facility used for P.E. and swim competitions.

name: New Building
description: The newest academic building with modern classroom facilities.

name: Canteen
description: Main food court and student cafeteria area.

name: M.E Offices
description: Offices for Mechanical Engineering faculty and coordinators.

name: Science Labs (Chem/Bio/Phys)
description: State-of-the-art laboratories for Chemistry, Biology, and Physics experiments.

name: Annex Building
description: Additional administrative and academic support offices.
